forgotPassword.title: Скидання пароля

batch.confirmDelete: Delete selected devices? This cannot be undone.

actions.confirmUninstall: Uninstall the agent from this device?

agent.taskRetrieveDelayDesc: Як часто агенти перевіряють очікуючі завдання коли командний канал недоступний (секунди, мін 1).
agent.checkIntervalDesc: How often agents push metrics (seconds). Overridable per group or device.
agent.heartbeatMonitoringDesc: Alert when an agent stops pushing (goes offline). Overridable per group or device.
agent.maxMissedPushesDesc: Consecutive missed pushes before marking an agent as offline. Overridable per group.
agent.scanIntervalDesc: How often agents automatically scan inventory, updates and compliance (seconds). 0 = disabled.

obligate.description: Connect this app to your Obligate SSO gateway for centralized authentication and cross-app navigation. Register this app in Obligate first, then paste the API key here.
obligate.warning: When enabled, local authentication is disabled. Users must sign in through the Obligate gateway. If the gateway becomes unreachable, local authentication is automatically restored as a fallback.

settings.title: Global Settings
settings.globalDesc: These defaults apply to all groups and monitors unless overridden at a lower level.
settings.agentDefaultsDesc: These defaults apply to all agent groups and devices unless overridden at a lower level.

smtp.title: SMTP Servers
smtp.noServers: No SMTP servers configured. Add one to use Email notifications.

security.title: Security
security.allow2faDesc: Users can enable TOTP or Email OTP from their profile.
security.force2faDesc:
Users without a 2FA method will be warned to set one up.
Bypass via DISABLE_2FA_FORCE=true in .env.
security.otpSmtpDesc: Used to send one-time codes when Email OTP is enabled.

compliance.presetsNote: Вибір пресету заповнює правила — їх можна налаштувати перед збереженням.

settings.overrideGroupSettingsDesc: Apply per-device values instead of group/global defaults
settings.autoRemediationDesc: Allow compliance policies to automatically run fix scripts on this device. Disable if this device must remain in a specific state (e.g. firewall intentionally off).
settings.autoRemediationDisabledWarning: Auto-remediation is disabled. Failing rules will be reported but no fix scripts will run on this device.

users.confirmResetMfa: Вимкнути всі методи 2FA для "{{username}}"? Користувач зможе увійти без другого фактора.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Manage agents and API keys
agents.noAgentGroups: No agent groups found. Create one in Groups settings.
agents.groupThresholdsNote: ✓ Group default thresholds will be applied
agents.heartbeatMonitoringDesc: Alert if agent goes offline (DOWN). Disable for workstations.
agents.overrideGroupSettingsDesc: Use this device's own thresholds and push interval instead of the group's.
agents.suspendedDesc: Block the agent without deleting it. The monitor is paused; the device cannot push data.
agents.bulkEditDesc: Only changed fields will be applied. Mixed values show as indeterminate (—).

notifType.title: Notification Types
notifType.desc: Control which kinds of notifications are sent for agents in this group/device.
notifType.globalDesc: Master switch — disabling silences all notifications (channels remain bound)
notifType.downDesc: Notify when the agent goes offline or down
notifType.alertDesc: Notify when a threshold is breached
notifType.updateDesc: Notify when the agent starts a self-update

addAgent.title: Add Agent
addAgent.noKeys: Create an API key first in the Agents page

about.title: Про систему
about.loadFailed: Не вдалося завантажити інформацію про систему.

groups.noGroupsDesc: Create groups to organize your monitors
groups.confirmDelete: Delete group "{{name}}" and all its sub-groups? Monitors will become ungrouped.
groups.confirmClear: Clear all heartbeat/uptime data for group "{{name}}" and all its sub-groups? This cannot be undone.

form.name: Назва
form.agentGroupDesc: Agent groups organise servers/machines. Default thresholds apply on device approval.
form.monitorGroupDesc: Monitor groups organise HTTP, ping, and other monitors.
form.groupNotificationsDesc: Send a single notification when the first monitor goes down, and one recovery when all are back up.

detail.pushIntervalDesc: Applied to new agents in this group (empty = device default)
detail.heartbeatMonitoringDesc: Alert when agents go offline (null = device default)
detail.maxMissedPushesDesc: Consecutive missed pushes before marking offline (empty = 2)
detail.thresholdsDesc: Inherited by agents in this group (overridable per agent)

groups.title: Groups

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noChannelsDesc: Create channels to receive alerts when monitors go down
notifications.noSmtp: No SMTP servers configured. Add one in Settings → SMTP Servers.

remediations.title: Remediations
remediations.descN8n: Trigger an N8N workflow via webhook
remediations.descScript: Run a shell script on the server
remediations.descSsh: Run a command on a remote host via SSH
remediations.globalBindingsDesc: Globally bound actions fire for every monitor status change.
remediations.credentialsNote: Credentials are stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM) on the server.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Windows
maintenance.description: Define scheduled maintenance periods. During maintenance, alerts are suppressed and heartbeats are shown in blue.
maintenance.rule1: Global windows apply to all groups, monitors and agents system-wide.
maintenance.rule2: Group windows apply to all monitors and agents in the group and its subgroups.
maintenance.rule3: Monitor / Agent windows are local to that specific monitor or agent.
maintenance.rule4: Windows are additive — all applicable windows (global + group + local) are active simultaneously.
maintenance.rule5: Any scope can disable a specific inherited window without affecting other scopes.
maintenance.rule6: Down/pending heartbeats appear in blue and are excluded from uptime % and average response time.
maintenance.rule7: Notifications and remediations are suppressed during maintenance.
maintenance.rule8: One-time windows are automatically deleted after their end date.
maintenance.notifyChannelsDesc: Selected channels receive a message when maintenance starts and ends.
maintenance.validationDates: Start and end date/time are required.
maintenance.validationScope: Please select at least one scope target.

importExport.title: Import / Export
importExport.description: Export your configuration to a portable JSON file, or import a previously saved file.
importExport.exportDesc: Choose what to include in the exported file, then download it.
importExport.includeSshDesc: Export plaintext SSH passwords and private keys. Off by default for security.
importExport.selectSection: Select at least one section to export
importExport.dropzone: Click or drag & drop an export file (.json)
importExport.conflictLabel: When a UUID already exists in the database
importExport.conflictUpdateDesc: When a UUID matches an existing record, overwrite it with the imported data.
importExport.conflictCopyDesc: When a UUID matches an existing record, create a brand-new duplicate with a fresh UUID.
importExport.conflictSkipDesc: When a UUID matches an existing record, skip that item entirely.
importExport.noFile: Please choose an export file first
importExport.noSections: Select at least one section to import
importExport.noImportable: No importable sections found in this file.

download.title: Obli.tools
download.description:
A lightweight native interface that groups all your Obli apps into one window.
Get sound notifications and a distraction-free monitoring experience.
download.buildFromSourceDesc: The desktop app lives in the desktop-app/ directory of the Obliance repository.
download.step1: On first launch, enter your Obliview server URL. Linked apps (Obliguard, Oblimap, Obliance) are discovered automatically.
download.step2: Each app opens in its own native tab — no browser overhead, no address bar, sessions are preserved when switching tabs.
download.step3: Sound notifications play when a probe goes down/up or an agent threshold is breached/cleared.
download.step4: Click the ⚙ gear icon (bottom-right corner) to change the server URL at any time.
download.step5: No rebuild is needed after Obliance updates — the app always loads the latest web UI.

features.soundAlerts: Sound alerts for probe down / recovery

discovery.title: Network Discovery
discovery.subtitle: Devices discovered on your network by agent scans
discovery.noResults: No discovered devices yet. Run a scan from an online agent.
